extraction.one_line_summary: PIDCOCK Thomas won from the breakaway while VINGEGAARD defended yellow against POGACAR's late surge in final meters.
tactical_patterns: POWLESS Nielsen attacked immediately in neutral section attempting early solo move before HC climbs started.
POGACAR Tadej attacked in final 200m sprint for time bonuses despite VINGEGAARD holding yellow by 2:22.
FROOME Chris finished top-3 first time since February 2019, signaling unexpected form recovery in third week.

rider_signals.PIDCOCK Thomas: positive: First GT stage win at 23, previously only rode one GT (2019 Vuelta 67th), team initially hesitant to select him
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: positive: Most aggressive rider award, attacked from kilometer zero in neutral section on double-HC day
rider_signals.VAN AART Wout: neutral: Skipped intermediate sprint points to conserve energy for domestique duties supporting VINGEGAARD
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: First top-3 finish since horrific June 2019 crash, showing late-tour Alpine form
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Moved from 3rd to 2nd GC, jumping POGACAR who dropped from 2nd to 4th
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Dropped from 4th to outside top-5, unable to match GC contenders on double-HC Alpine stage
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: Lost ground but commentator noted Alpine weakness often rebounds in Pyrenees still to come
